rulings.Case Title: SF 861 POST STREET,LLC VS. M.C. VAN ABKOUDE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 15, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT M.C. VAN ABKOUDE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions. GRANTED in Part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to the request for terminating sanctions. Motion is granted as to the request for monetary sanctions in the amount of $960 to be paid by Plaintiff and its counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)
